title: HÆMA Blood-Meal Metabarcoding Pipeline Parameters
description: Parameters for the HÆMA ONT blood-meal metabarcoding pipeline.

input_output.title: Input / output
input_output.description: Required inputs and where results go.

input.description: REQUIRED. Samplesheet CSV linking run_id, barcode_id, sample_id, sample_type, and collection metadata. Use -profile test for bundled demo data.

raw_data_dir.description: REQUIRED for FASTQ input. Root directory containing <run_id>/.../fastq_pass/<barcode> folders.

primers.description: Primer CSV with Gene, Forward_Primer, Reverse_Primer, and Size columns.

reference_fasta.description: Curated local vertebrate reference FASTA used to build the BLAST database.

curated_reference_metadata.description: Optional CSV/TSV sidecar for curated reference records with seqid, taxid, scientific_name, rank, and provenance.

reference_targets.description: Ghana/West African accession-driven reference target manifest used by production preflight and panel-building checks.

log_dir.description: Directory for Nextflow execution trace/report/timeline/DAG files.

input_type.description: Input data type. 'fastq' = already-basecalled, already-demultiplexed MinKNOW fastq_pass/barcodeXX (the standard input). 'pooled_fastq' enables optional advanced demultiplexing of one or more pooled FASTQ files.

pooled_fastq.description: Glob or path for pooled FASTQ input used by advanced demultiplexing.

fastq_extensions.description: Comma-separated FASTQ file extensions recognised during input validation.

sequencing_demux.title: Sequencing & demultiplexing
sequencing_demux.description: ONT chemistry metadata and optional demultiplexing.

barcode_kit.description: ONT barcode kit recorded in metadata and production preflight.

flowcell.description: ONT flowcell/chemistry recorded in metadata and run manifest.

basecalling_model.description: Basecalling model used to produce MinKNOW FASTQ input.

demux_strategy.description: Demultiplexing strategy. Production FASTQ runs trust the containing MinKNOW barcode folder.

enable_advanced_demux.description: Run optional advanced demultiplexing before input validation.

advanced_demux_tool.description: Advanced demultiplexing backend. command_template/barbell/deepbinner require advanced_demux_command_template.

advanced_demux_command_template.description: Command template for external demultiplexers. Placeholders: {input}, {input_list}, {output}, {barcode_kit}, {threads}.

advanced_demux_min_reads_per_barcode.description: Minimum reads a barcode must yield to be retained by the header_tag advanced demultiplexer.

demux_run_id.description: Run identifier assigned to the synthetic MinKNOW-like tree produced by advanced demultiplexing.

qc_splitting.title: Read QC & marker splitting
qc_splitting.description: Quality/length filtering and assignment of reads to markers.

min_read_length.description: Minimum raw read length before marker splitting.

marker_windows.description: Optional comma-separated marker:min:max length windows after primer trimming. Empty means derive windows from primer CSV Size.

marker_window_padding.description: Length padding added around primer CSV Size when marker_windows is empty.

primer_search_window.description: Window (bp) at each read terminus searched for primer evidence during trim/split.

primer_max_error_rate.description: Allowed mismatch fraction for terminal primer evidence.

allow_length_fallback.description: Allow marker assignment by amplicon length window when primer evidence is absent.

denoising.title: Mixed-template denoising
denoising.description: Pre-consensus UMAP/HDBSCAN separation of mixed host reads.

enable_mixed_denoising.description: Run pre-consensus mixed-template denoising on marker FASTQs before consensus/ASV generation.

mixed_denoise_backend.description: Backend for pre-consensus mixed-template separation. UMAP/HDBSCAN falls back to greedy when allowed.

mixed_denoise_kmer_size.description: k-mer size used for UMAP/HDBSCAN read vectors.

mixed_denoise_min_cluster_size.description: Minimum reads retained per denoised template cluster.

mixed_denoise_min_cluster_fraction.description: Minimum sample/marker read fraction retained per denoised template cluster.

mixed_denoise_min_reads_for_umap.description: Minimum reads required before attempting UMAP/HDBSCAN; smaller groups use fallback when enabled.

mixed_denoise_allow_greedy_fallback.description: Allow deterministic greedy clustering when UMAP/HDBSCAN is unavailable (e.g. the default python:3.11 image lacks umap-learn/hdbscan; use --python_container haema-python:0.3.0 for real UMAP).

consensus.title: Consensus & polishing
consensus.description: Feature generation and optional Medaka polishing.

consensus_method.description: Feature generation method. cluster performs greedy mixed-template-aware consensus; dereplicate keeps exact sequences.

min_cluster_identity.description: Minimum approximate identity for assigning a read to an existing cluster when consensus_method is cluster.

min_asv_reads.description: Minimum reads supporting a feature (ASV/consensus) for it to be retained.

min_asv_fraction.description: Minimum sample/marker read fraction for a feature to be retained.

enable_medaka.description: Polish retained consensus/ASV FASTA with Medaka before taxonomy (on by default; needs the pinned ONT Medaka image and a model present in it, verified at runtime). The test profile disables it for speed.

medaka_model.description: Medaka model for ONT R10.4.1 SUP data. Override to match the installed Medaka model list.

taxonomy.title: Taxonomic assignment
taxonomy.description: Curated local-first BLAST + conservative LCA, optional nt fallback.

skip_taxonomy.description: Skip BLAST and emit explicit unassigned taxonomy rows.

taxonomy_strategy.description: Taxonomy strategy. curated_then_fallback queries the curated reference first and uses an external database only for unresolved features.

blast_db.description: External BLAST database prefix used when taxonomy_strategy is nt_only.

fallback_blast_db.description: External BLAST database prefix used as fallback after the curated panel, for example /path/to/blast_db/nt/nt.

blast_db_mount.description: Host directory to mount read-only into Docker so external BLAST database prefixes are visible inside containers.

reference_db_label.description: Source label recorded for assignments from the curated local panel.

blast_db_label.description: Source label recorded for assignments from the external nt-only BLAST database.

fallback_blast_db_label.description: Source label recorded for assignments from the fallback BLAST database.

min_blast_identity.description: Minimum percent identity for a BLAST hit to support an assignment.

min_blast_coverage.description: Minimum query coverage percent for a BLAST hit to support an assignment.

top_bitscore_delta.description: Bit-score window within which competing hits are treated as ties for conservative LCA.

taxonomy_assignment_method.description: Taxonomy assignment method. Taxid LCA requires taxdump_dir and BLAST staxids; otherwise the parser falls back to conservative top-hit/genus logic.

taxdump_dir.description: Optional directory containing NCBI nodes.dmp and names.dmp for taxid-backed LCA.

require_curated_taxids.description: Fail curated-panel taxonomy if any FASTA record lacks valid taxid metadata.

require_taxdump_for_lca.description: Fail LCA mode unless taxdump_dir contains NCBI taxonomy files.

contamination_host.title: Contamination & host model
contamination_host.description: Control-aware background and RAMBO-style host calls.

negative_control_multiplier.description: Scaling factor applied to negative-control-derived background thresholds during aggregation.

enable_rambo_model.description: Generate RAMBO-style mixed-host evidence and host-call tables from feature-level assignments.

rambo_min_host_reads.description: Minimum host-level reads per sample/marker for the RAMBO-style host-call table.

rambo_min_host_fraction.description: Minimum host-level fraction per sample/marker for the RAMBO-style host-call table.

rambo_include_contaminants.description: Include contamination-flagged features in the RAMBO-style host-call evidence.

enable_r_outputs.description: Generate bloodmeal_ecology_data.rds and background-threshold tables with R.

enable_phyloseq.description: Generate bloodmeal_phyloseq.rds. Uses formal phyloseq if installed, otherwise a fallback object unless strict_bioconductor is true.

enable_decontam.description: Generate decontam_results.tsv. Uses formal decontam if installed, otherwise a negative-control prevalence fallback unless strict_bioconductor is true.

strict_bioconductor.description: Fail if formal phyloseq/decontam packages are unavailable when those outputs are enabled.

decontam_threshold.description: Threshold for decontam prevalence or fallback negative-control prevalence calls.

enable_multiqc.description: Generate a MultiQC report when native logs are available.

eco_index_zone_column.description: Samplesheet column used as the ecological-zone stratifier for ecological indices (HBI, zoophily, diversity).

eco_index_species_column.description: Samplesheet column used as the vector sibling-species stratifier for ecological indices.

enable_figures.description: Generate publication-ready manuscript figures (matplotlib/seaborn) from the endpoint tables into 07_figures/. Needs the figures_container; disabled by the test profile.

figure_formats.description: Comma-separated output formats for figures (any of pdf, svg, png).

require_fastqs.description: Fail validation when a samplesheet sample has no matching FASTQ files.

strict_metadata.description: Require the richer MIEM/MIMARKS metadata fields (enabled by the production profile).

strict_barcode_filenames.description: Fail validation when barcode IDs in FASTQ filenames disagree with containing barcode folders.

production_mode.description: Enable strict production preflight checks for metadata, databases, taxdump, Medaka, and formal R/Bioconductor outputs.

cleanup.description: Delete each task work directory on successful completion. Saves disk but disables -resume.

python_container.description: Default Python container (digest-pinned full image; full not -slim because Nextflow needs procps/ps). Production profile overrides with haema-python:0.3.0 for UMAP/HDBSCAN dependencies.

blast_container.description: BLAST container (digest-pinned BioContainer) used for makeblastdb and blastn.

advanced_demux_container.description: Container (digest-pinned) used by the built-in pooled FASTQ header-tag demultiplexing wrapper.

medaka_container.description: Medaka container pinned to an immutable upstream sha-tag (never :latest). The required model is verified at runtime by MEDAKA_MODEL_PREFLIGHT.

r_container.description: R container (digest-pinned) for fallback ecology outputs. Production profile overrides with haema-r:0.3.0 for formal phyloseq/decontam.

figures_container.description: Figure-generation container (matplotlib/seaborn). Build from containers/haema-figures/Dockerfile or push to a registry and pass its @sha256 digest, like haema-python/haema-r.
